name: Varian Medical Systems, Inc.
description: Varian Medical Systems, Inc., a Siemens Healthineers company, is a global leader in radiation oncology treatments and software. Headquartered in Palo Alto, California, the company specializes in developing medical devices, including linear accelerators, and advanced software solutions for radiotherapy, radiosurgery, proton therapy, and brachytherapy. Varian is dedicated to elevating cancer care across the entire patient journey by enhancing patient experiences, streamlining clinical workflows, and making innovative, personalized care accessible to healthcare providers and patients worldwide, ultimately striving for a world without the fear of cancer.
